title: Bridge Essay: Re-thinging Embodied and Enactive Psychiatry: A Material Engagement Approach.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

**Re-thinging Embodied and Enactive Psychiatry: A Material Engagement Approach.**. Cult Med Psychiatry.. PMID: 39026131. DOI: 10.1007/s11013-024-09872-6. Emerging consensus among enactivist philosophers and embodied mind theorists suggests that seeking to understand mental illness we need to look out of our skulls at the ecology of the brain. Still, the complex links between materiality (in broadest sense of material objects, habits, practices and environments) and mental health remain little understood.
